source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Cormorant Garamond for refined display moments, Geist for precise product UI, Geist Mono for tabular data, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, forms, labels, and status text.
layout: Petal-lobe cards, quiet dashboard grids, compact navigation, precise forms and tables, command search, 8px radii, soft pearly shadows, smoky speckle dividers, and blush/green state contrast.

prompts.label: Transparent orchid mantis motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Orchid Mantis transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated orchid mantis motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single orchid mantis with accurate anatomy, petal-like legs and thorax, pearly white body, soft blush-pink wing and limb gradients, translucent petal edges, tiny rose-petal markings, pale chartreuse-green reflected shadow on the underside, refined luxury camouflage mood, crisp silhouette edges, and natural insect detail. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full mantis, head, antennae, forelegs, petal-like lobes, abdomen, and all legs without cropping. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Constraints: no orchid flower as the main subject, no flower stem, no leaves, no landscape, no second insect, no green-only mantis, no toy or jewelry look, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Orchid Mantis light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent orchid mantis motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Orchid Mantis", derived from the visible transparent orchid mantis cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Orchid Mantis, Orchid Mantis, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from pearly orchid white, blush petal pink, translucent petal gray, pollen cream, pale mantis green, leaf shadow, smoky speckles, amber claws, and deep tropical shadow. UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style camouflaged luxury system, precise grid, 8px radius, pearly surfaces, petal-lobe cards, blush active states, green-shadow secondary states, smoky speckle borders, and orchid-pollen focus rings. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Orchid Mantis" or "Orchid Mantis", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Orchid Mantis dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent orchid mantis motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Orchid Mantis". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible orchid mantis cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Orchid Mantis, Orchid Mantis, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark background derived from deep tropical leaf shadow and smoky petal speckles; foreground from orchid white and pollen cream; primary actions from blush petal pink; secondary states from pale mantis green and leaf shadow; surfaces from smoky mauve-gray and deep charcoal; borders from speckle gray; subtle translucent petal texture overlays and soft pearly highlights. UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Orchid Mantis" or "Orchid Mantis", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
